'''Steve Snitch''' (born {{birth date|1983|2|22|df=y}}) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer, who currently plays in the [[Championship (rugby league)|Kingstone Press Championship]] for [[Doncaster R.L.F.C.|Doncaster]].<ref name="Statistics at loverugbyleague.com"/><ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/>

Snitch was born in [[Kingston upon Hull]], and has previous played at club level for [[Wakefield Trinity]]<ref name="Giants' Snitch back at Wakefield">{{cite web|url=https://news.bbc.co.uk/sport2/hi/rugby_league/super_league/wakefield/7654365.stm|title=Giants' Snitch back at Wakefield|publisher=BBC|date=6 October 2008|access-date=6 October 2008}}</ref> (two spells), the [[Huddersfield Giants]] and the [[Castleford Tigers]]. Snitch played for Huddersfield in the [[2006 Challenge Cup]] Final from the interchange bench against [[St Helens R.F.C.|St. Helens]] but Huddersfield lost 12–42. In 2013 Snitch played for the [[Cairns]] based [[Queensland Cup|{{not a typo|Intrust}} Super Cup]] team, the [[Northern Pride RLFC|Northern Pride]].
